info.title: Suno Music Generation
info.description: API reference for Suno Music Generation on Ace Data Cloud.

data.lyric:
[Verse]
Snowflakes falling like whispered dreams
Frosty windows
Cocoa steam
Candles flicker
Hearts aglow
The quiet hum of winter’s show
[Chorus]
Oh the world feels soft tonight
Wrapped in stars and silver light
Christmas whispers
Hold it tight
Snowfall serenade
[Verse 2]
Footprints weaving through the white
Every step feels just so right
Laughter echoes
Fires burn
Every corner a joy to turn
[Prechorus]
Holly hangs and bells will ring
Magic hums in everything
[Chorus]
Oh the world feels soft tonight
Wrapped in stars and silver light
Christmas whispers
Hold it tight
Snowfall serenade
[Bridge]
Stockings hung with quiet care
Dreams and wishes fill the air
A moment frozen
Time stands still
Hearts align
They always will
data.style: uplifting, orchestral with sleigh bells and warm strings
data.title: Snowfall Serenade

data.text:
[Verse]
Snowflakes falling from the sky
Winter's cold touch
Oh how it gets me high
I bundle up in layers
Oh so cozy
Stepping out and feeling the frost on my nose

[Chorus]
Oh
Winter's cold touch
It's a season that I love so much
Snowfall brings a feeling so divine
Winter's cold touch
It's a magical time
data.title: Winter's Cold Touch

data.text:
[Verse]
The world is covered in a blanket of white
Icicles hanging
Shimmering so bright
The chilly air fills my lungs with every breath
Walking in the snow
Leaving footprints behind

[Chorus]
Winter wonderland
Everything is so bright
Winter wonderland
Hold me through the night
data.title: Winter Wonderland

data.text:
Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

你在站里频频回头  
我在站外舍不得走  
有一种不祥的感受  
今天的离别像分手  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

你消失在人群之中  
就像被风吹散的梦  
广州南站人潮汹涌  
有谁在乎我的心痛  

我像个广州的孤儿  
我像个多余的孤儿  
我像个无助的孤儿  
如今又是独自一人  

一路平安我爱的人  
一路珍重我爱的人  
一路平安离去的人  
一路珍重远去的人  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  
Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

坐在二号线地铁里  
忽然感觉有些委屈  
永泰站外飘着细雨  
有谁在乎我的哭泣  

在注定失眠的夜里  
不知如何安慰自己  
举杯敬自己和过去  
今天终将成为回忆  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  
Sambuy come back  
Sambuy come back  

我像个广州的孤儿  
我像个被弃的孤儿  
我像个漂泊的孤儿  
如今仍是独自一人  

一生平安我爱的人  
一生珍重我爱的人  
一生平安离去的人  
一生珍重远去的人  

啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
Sambuy come back  
Sambuy come back  

啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
我像个广州的孤儿  
Sambuy come back bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn
